name: W-10 /cl-status --format=json emits a JSON array of session envelopes for machine consumption
command: mkdir -p sessions && printf '%s' '{"session_id":"a","phases":["E"],"branch":"x"}' > sessions/a.json && printf '%s' '{"session_id":"b","phases":["F"],"branch":"y"}' > sessions/b.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cl-status.sh" --format=json --sessions-dir sessions >out.json 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const a=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));process.exit(Array.isArray(a)&&a.length===2?0:1)' && echo json 1>&2
